supplier.name: Supplier
supplier.no_data_12m: No supplier data available over 12 months

guide.title: Financial Analysis Guide
guide.subtitle: Understand indicators, calculations, and the methodology of your financial tools.

seller_ranking.title: Seller Ranking
seller_ranking.desc: Analysis of the individual performance of your commercial team.
seller_ranking.methodology_desc: The ranking is based on the turnover (TTC) achieved by each seller over the selected period.
seller_ranking.basket_desc: Average Basket = Total CA / Number of Sales
seller_ranking.evolution_desc: Evolution = Comparison with the previous period (e.g., current month vs last month).

supplier_purchases.title: Supplier Purchases
supplier_purchases.desc: Precise calculation of what you actually owe your partners.
supplier_purchases.methodology_desc: The amount shown corresponds to actual purchases after deduction of returns/credit notes.
supplier_purchases.formula: Total Net = (Sum of Purchase Invoices) - (Sum of Credit Notes / Returns)

scoring_performance.title: Scoring & Performance
scoring_performance.desc: Automatic evaluation system for your suppliers on 100 points.
scoring_performance.volume_desc: Based on the total amount of purchases over the last 12 months.
scoring_performance.quality_desc: Rate of returns and complaints (the fewer returns you have, the better the score).
scoring_performance.regularity_desc: Frequency and constancy of your orders throughout the year.

advanced_analysis.title: Advanced Analysis
advanced_analysis.low_margin_desc: Products with a high sales volume but a margin < 15%.
advanced_analysis.dormant_stock_desc: High margin products (> 40%) without significant sales for 3 months.
advanced_analysis.price_optimization_desc: Suggests a +5% adjustment on products with critical margins (< 10%).
advanced_analysis.empty_table_desc: If you don't see any data in the three tables (Low Margin, Dormant Stock, or Price Optimization), it's usually a sign of excellent financial health or very strict detection thresholds:
advanced_analysis.reason_1: 01. "Low Margin" Table: Empty because all your sold products have margins above 15% (no "low margin" detected).
advanced_analysis.reason_2: 02. "Price Optimization" Table: Empty because you have no critical products with a margin below 10%.
advanced_analysis.reason_3: 03. "Dormant Stock" Table: Empty because your high margin items (>40%) are selling well enough not to be considered immobilized.
